overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic video game (Fallout 4), showing a character in a long coat walking through ruined streets of a historic city. The environment features cracked pavement, abandoned vehicles, dilapidated stone buildings, and the distinctive masts of a historic sailing ship (USS Constitution) visible in the distance. The atmosphere is desolate with overcast lighting and a brownish color grade.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined historic street with abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of a debris-filled street, observing the ruined architecture and distant ship masts

entered.detail: dilapidated multi-story stone buildings with broken windows and overgrown vines
black wrought iron fence running along the right side of the street
tall wooden masts of a historic sailing ship visible above the treeline
rusted cars and trucks left on the cracked pavement
tilted black street lamp posts along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a ruined city street lined with dilapidated stone buildings on the left and an iron fence on the right. Abandoned vehicles litter the cracked asphalt road. In the distance, the tall masts of a historic ship are visible against the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrowing street approaching large red vehicle obstruction

events.description: character passes a large red double-decker bus wreckage on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while approaching and passing a large red vehicle wreck, observing an NPC ahead on the right

notable_agents.action: standing still on the sidewalk near the fence, facing the street

entered.detail: large red double-decker bus lying on its side, partially blocking the street
grand stone buildings with columns and balconies, heavily damaged

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a massive red double-decker bus wreckage lying on the left side of the street. An NPC stands stationary on the right sidewalk near the iron fence. The tall ship masts grow larger in the background as the character advances through the ruined historic district.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with view of historic domed building and ship

events.description: character turns slightly right toward the ship while entering a more open intersection area

agents.ego_description: walking through an open intersection while turning to face the large ship, passing barricades and debris

entered.detail: large building with a golden dome visible in the distance
full view of the historic wooden sailing ship with multiple masts and rigging
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking parts of the road

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide intersection with views of a domed building in the distance left and the full USS Constitution ship visible right. The character turns toward the ship while walking past striped barricades. The historic mansion buildings pass by on the left as the ship dominates the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship viewing area with stone gates and fencing

events.description: character passes under a wooden sign with a skull symbol hanging between stone pillars

agents.ego_description: walking along the fence line viewing the historic ship up close, passing stone gates and signage

entered.detail: large stone pillars with decorative tops marking an entrance
black wooden sign featuring a white skull symbol hanging from a horizontal beam
small structure with a bright red door attached to the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the ship up close, walking along a stone wall and iron fence. A wooden sign with a skull symbol hangs between stone pillars overhead. The USS Constitution dominates the left side of the frame as the character passes the stone gates, with the red door structure visible on the right. The scene ends with the character continuing past the ship viewing area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a ruined historic city street that gradually opens up to reveal a massive sailing ship. It begins with the character walking down a cracked asphalt road lined with dilapidated stone buildings and abandoned vehicles, while the distant masts of a ship pierce the overcast sky. As the character advances, the camera passes the wreckage of a massive red double-decker bus and a stationary figure on the sidewalk, causing the ship's silhouette to grow larger in the background. The scene then expands into a wide intersection where the character moves past striped barricades and historic mansions, turning toward the full scale of the USS Constitution. Finally, the camera approaches the vessel up close, passing under a wooden skull sign and through stone gates before continuing past the ship's viewing area.
